bird.name: White-winged black tit
bird.summary: The white-winged black tit (Melaniparus leucomelas) is a passerine bird in the tit family Paridae. It is also known as the white-winged tit…

locations.name: 安哥拉
locations.summary: 安哥拉共和國（葡萄牙語：República de Angola），通稱安哥拉（葡萄牙語：Angola），是位于非洲西南部的國家，西濱大西洋，北及東北鄰剛果民主共和國，南鄰納米比亞，東南鄰尚比亞，另有一塊外飛地卡賓達省，位於剛果共和國和剛果…

relations.subject: White-winged black tit
relations.evidence: It is found in central Africa, from Angola in the west to Ethiopia in the east
